indicators.name: large island with flat surface
indicators.rationale: The large flat surface can serve as a temporary workspace for computer work.

indicators.name: seating options available
indicators.rationale: There are chairs available for sitting while working, though they are not ergonomic.

indicators.name: lighting from overhead fixtures
indicators.rationale: Overhead lighting provides general illumination, but it may not be sufficient for detailed screen work.

indicators.name: cabinets and shelves for storage
indicators.rationale: Storage space is available for keeping work-related items organized.

indicators.name: open layout with windows
indicators.rationale: Open layout with windows may lead to distractions and reduced privacy.

reasoning_summary: The scene is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo). The large flat surface on the island can serve as a temporary workspace, and there are chairs available for sitting. However, the open layout with windows may lead to distractions and reduced privacy, and the lighting may not be sufficient for detailed screen work.
